title: Kitchen Porter CV Example UK — Hotels & Restaurants

cv.name: Tom Hughes
cv.title: Kitchen Porter
cv.summary: Hard-working kitchen porter with 2 years supporting busy hotel kitchens through breakfast, lunch, and dinner services. Food Hygiene Level 2 certified with strong cleanliness standards and reliable attendance.

bullets: Supported brigade of 10 chefs during 200+ cover banquet services
Maintained pot wash and kitchen floors to audit-ready standards
Rotated dry store stock reducing waste from expired goods by 20%
Prepped vegetables and basic mise en place for lunch service
Completed closing clean-down checklist every shift without exceptions
